root_cause: _match_regexp() used re.match() (prefix-only anchoring) instead of re.fullmatch() (full-string anchoring), allowing suffix-appended classnames to bypass the deserialization allowlist
how_to_run: python3 dev/repro_ghsa_6ffj_2wg2_w45j.py  OR  uv run --project task-sdk pytest task-sdk/tests/task_sdk/serde/test_ghsa_6ffj_2wg2_w45j.py -xvs
evidence: With allowed_deserialization_classes_regexp='airflow\.models\.Variable', re.match() accepts 'airflow.models.Variable_Malicious' (prefix match) while re.fullmatch() correctly rejects it
